## Zscaler Valuation Revisited Against Zero Trust Adoption Tailwind

Recurring valuation-vs-tailwind framing in public coverage can reflect accumulation interest around ZS; limited standalone signal but worth tracking alongside institutional flow data for sentiment direction.

- Coverage asks whether ZS is a bargain given continued zero trust adoption growth — thesis-consistent framing but no new fundamental event.
- No earnings revision, contract win, or guidance update is cited as a trigger; this is an opinion-based valuation assessment.
- Zero trust adoption is characterized as a growing tailwind underpinning the ZS investment case.
- Classifier confidence is medium; the piece reinforces the existing thesis without adding new data.
